data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures secure communication between users and the website with strong encryption protocols.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2/1.3 with advanced cipher suites and HSTS enabled.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects against common web-based attacks such as SQL injection and XSS.
data.technical_spec: Implements rule-based WAF policies using proprietary and vendor solutions.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Defends against distributed denial-of-service attacks to maintain site availability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes scrubbing centers and traffic analysis systems.

data.title: Patching and Updates
data.description: Regularly applies security updates to software and infrastructure components.
data.technical_spec: Automated and manually controlled patch management processes.

data.title: Authentication and Access Control
data.description: Strong policy for verifying user identity and limiting access rights.
data.technical_spec: Uses Apple ID with 2FA for user authentication.
